daily.content:
### Priority Shift
- Captain ordered ALL 3D work stopped
- EPIC-003 (Mission Control Dashboard) is now sole P0
- Sprint 3 started: MC-001 through MC-004
- Effort points system deployed (Fibonacci: 1/2/3/5/8/13)
- Jinbe (Scrum Master) enforcing at 8:30 AM daily

### Major Progress
- Franky delivered hierarchy tree view + calendar week view
- Task board cleaned: 158 → 110 tasks, then 50 active → 21 active
- Priority points system applied to all tasks
- Department loads calculated
- Jinbe (Scrum Master) activated with daily 8:30 AM cron
- Robin-ops anti-loop patched
- Effort points system created and deployed

### Crew Architecture Finalized
- Full pipeline: Robin → Brook → Usopp → Franky → Brook UX → Chopper QA → Captain
- Zoro security KT prepared, Jinbe scrum KT prepared
- Security audit: tokens need rotation, no TLS between gateways
- Session bloat cleanup: 302 sessions pruned

### Sprint 2 Launch
- 3D Office Tab work started (EPIC-002)
- Sanji and Usopp agents onboarded
- Crew roles and scopes defined by Captain mandate
